spec_match.rationale: Superb feature detection using CSS.supports('selector(...)') checking all 7 distinct media selectors.

interactive.rationale: Excellent diagnostic board! Prints supports lists dynamically, features a base64 silent audio stream loop, and gives a copy-pasteable JS fallback pattern snippet.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Great informational value comparing native CSS selectors against event-driven callbacks.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles browser support query exceptions safely via try-catch.

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory reference link to the chromestatus.com/feature/5068277495758848 entry.

design_system.rationale: Clean, readable dashboard using monospace styling cards and standard public/styles.css vars.

openQuestions.title: Add missing chromestatus.com reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must include a link to the associated ChromeStatus entry. Add a link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5068277495758848 at the bottom of the page.

summary: The compatibility-lab is a premier diagnostic dashboard checking engine capabilities, but fails compliance due to a missing ChromeStatus reference link.
